what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only attachment record that associates a channel-memory artifact with a board item identified by a board:// URI.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an id (att-c2282f44), channel (dragnet-development), attachment_type (board_items), target (board://item-cea49fa1), and an added timestamp.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme rather than a file path or web URL.
There are no code symbols, narrative notes, or embedded media.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file for structured metadata.
Represents external targets with a custom board:// URI scheme.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone offset.
concerns: The file contains no contextual explanation of why the attachment exists.
The board:// URI cannot be resolved or verified from within this file alone.
No author or editor provenance is recorded.
notes: A bare channel-to-board attachment stub: it says something in dragnet-development is linked to board item item-cea49fa1, but nothing more.
questions: What specific channel-memory content or message is being attached?
What does board item item-cea49fa1 represent?
What semantics does attachment_type board_items imply (e.g., parent, reference, blocker)?
Is the attachment bidirectional or manually curated?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment provenance record, and its content matches that purpose: it records a link to a board item and nothing else.
intention_signals: It seems designed to persist a relationship between a channel conversation artifact and a project board item so the connection can be discovered later without relying on the original chat platform.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as the target of a file-local attachment record, with no accompanying narrative content.
contribution: Provides a durable, file-based cross-reference edge between a channel memory artifact and a board item, preserving a traceable link independent of the originating channel system.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-c2282f44 in the dragnet-development channel that links to board item item-cea49fa1 via a board:// URI, with no additional body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to record that a channel-memory artifact is attached to a specific board item for traceability.
